dct_description_sm: The 'Morrill Reckoning' story map is a project that acknowledges Indigenous lands that contributed to funding the University of Maryland. Dr. Lisa Carney, pursuing an MLIS in 2023, created the map as part of a certificate practicum requirement sponsored by the University of Maryland Libraries. This exhibit aligns with UMD initiatives promoting Indigenous knowledge, decolonization, and restorative justice. Supported by a 2022-2023 Teaching and Learning Program Grant, specifically 'Decolonizing Education to Meet the Demands of Climate Change,' led by Patricia Kosco Cossard at UMD Libraries, the exhibit sheds light on the historical dispossession of Native American lands.
